definitions: To find someone or something irresistibly charming or appealing, despite any potential drawbacks or intentions to the contrary.
To have an unavoidable affection or admiration for someone or something.
examples: She's so quirky, you just can't help but love her.
The old house has its flaws, but I can't help but love its character.
Even though he's a bit mischievous, his puppy eyes make you can't help but love him.
